canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset designed for evaluating retrieval-augmented generation systems on visually rich documents, where each query has a unique answer within a large corpus of approximately 6k images.
papers: ComplexTempQA: A 100m Dataset for Complex Temporal Question Answering
